title: gymnadenia × regeliana
intro: Gymnadenia × regeliana, also known as the Regel's Gymnadenia, is a hybrid orchid plant that is native to the mountainous regions of Eastern Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections due to its high concentration of terpenoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Gymnadenia × regeliana include its potential to improve respiratory health, reduce stress and anxiety, and even exhibit antitumor properties. The plant is typically harvested for its roots and leaves, which are then used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
